# ScarJo’s A.I. Revenge & WaPo in Limbo

Secret Gartenfeld, Ourand vs. Marchand, Hegseth Blowback
 ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌  ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌  ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌  ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌  ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌  ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌  ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌  ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌  ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌  ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌

| |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  | | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | | |  | | --- | | [View email in browser](https://email.puck.news/e/c/eyJlbWFpbF9pZCI6ImRnVDJ4Z1lEQUt2UktxclJLZ0dUazEyYU5vcFZ0cjNyTUNDMF9Gaz0iLCJocmVmIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9wdWNrLm5ld3MvbmV3c2xldHRlcl9hcmNoaXZlcy90aGUtZGFpbHktY291cmFudC8_) | | [The Daily Courant](https://email.puck.news/e/c/eyJlbWFpbF9pZCI6ImRnVDJ4Z1lEQUt2UktxclJLZ0dUazEyYU5vcFZ0cjNyTUNDMF9Gaz0iLCJocmVmIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9wdWNrLm5ld3MvbmV3c2xldHRlcl9hcmNoaXZlcy90aGUtZGFpbHktY291cmFudC8_) | | [The Daily Courant](https://email.puck.news/e/c/eyJlbWFpbF9pZCI6ImRnVDJ4Z1lEQUt2UktxclJLZ0dUazEyYU5vcFZ0cjNyTUNDMF9Gaz0iLCJocmVmIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9mYW1pbHljZW50ZXIubWV0YS5jb20vaW5zdGFncmFtLXNhZmV0eS8_) | | |  | | --- | | **Secret Gartenfeld, Ourand vs. Marchand, Hegseth Blowback** | | Welcome back to The Daily Courant, your afternoon digest featuring Puck’s best new reporting.     First up today, **Eriq Gardner** spotlights a first-of-its-kind class-action lawsuit, fronted by actor **Paul Lehrman** , alleging that A.I. voice generator Lovo illegally cloned his voice—along with **Barack Obama** ’s, **Conan O’Brien** ’s, **Elton John** ’s, and other bold-faced names. An imminent legal decision could upend an entire industry.     Plus, below the fold: **Marion Maneker** chats with ICA Miami’s wunderkind director, **Alex Gartenfeld** , about transforming Miami into a contemporary art mecca. **Abby Livingston** reveals how the various congressional cafeteria tables are assessing **Trump** ’s cabinet noms. On *The Varsity* , **John Ourand** reunites with The Athletic’s **Andrew Marchand** to celebrate his starring role in Puck’s cinematic universe, ESPN’s **Pat McAfee** strategy, and the escalating sports streaming wars. On *Somebody’s Gotta Win* , **Tara Palmeri** rings up lobbyist **Joe Hack** to download all the Beltway chatter surrounding Trump’s nominees. And on *The Powers That Be* , **Dylan Byers** joins **Peter Hamby** to diagnose the latest migraines at *The Washington Post* as **Will Lewis** attempts to reconfigure the newsroom. | |  | | [ScarJo’s A.I. Legacy](https://email.puck.news/e/c/eyJlbWFpbF9pZCI6ImRnVDJ4Z1lEQUt2UktxclJLZ0dUazEyYU5vcFZ0cjNyTUNDMF9Gaz0iLCJocmVmIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9wdWNrLm5ld3MvYS1sZXNzb24tZnJvbS1zY2FybGV0dC1qb2hhbnNzb24tb24td2hhdC10by1kby1pZi1haS1zdGVhbHMteW91ci12b2ljZS8_) | | ERIQ GARDNER | | Scarlett Johansson’s legal dustup with OpenAI last May opened the gates for voice-stealing claims from other actors. Now the fate of an entire entertainment sector may hinge on a pair of imminent decisions. | | | |  | | --- | | **A MESSAGE FROM INSTAGRAM** | |  | | **Instagram Teen Accounts: automatic protections for teens**     Parents want safer online experiences for their teens. That's why Instagram is introducing Teen Accounts, with automatic protections for who can contact teens and the content they can see.     A key factor: Only parents can approve safety setting changes for teens under 16.   [**Learn more**](https://email.puck.news/e/c/eyJlbWFpbF9pZCI6ImRnVDJ4Z1lEQUt2UktxclJLZ0dUazEyYU5vcFZ0cjNyTUNDMF9Gaz0iLCJocmVmIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9mYW1pbHljZW50ZXIubWV0YS5jb20vaW5zdGFncmFtLXNhZmV0eS8_) | | | |  | | --- | |  | | [Secret Gartenfeld](https://email.puck.) | | MARION MANEKER | | Forget Basel. The real center of Miami’s overachieving art community may be the newish Institute of Contemporary Art and Alex Gartenfeld, its wunderkind director, who has transformed the scene in a mere decade. | |  | | [Hegseth Senate-ology 101](https://email.puck.) | | ABBY LIVINGSTON | | The fate of Trump’s most crucial cabinet confirmations will be decided by a handful of Republican Senators, all of whom are playing a game of political Jenga. How much each has to lose, if anything, could be the deciding factor. | |  | | [Marchand!](https://email.puck.) | | JOHN OURAND | | After popular demand, The Athletic’s Andrew Marchand joins the pod to discuss McAfee, Manning, “Inside the NBA,” the Pitaro star strategy, the best Marchand jokes, and so much more. | | | |  | | --- | |  | |  | | | |  | | --- | |  | | [Will the Republican Senate Deny Trump His Carnival Cabinet?](https://email.puck.) | | TARA PALMERI | | Tara is joined by advisor and lobbyist Joe Hack to discuss the most recent developments within President-elect Donald Trump’s increasingly controversial cabinet selection process. They profile the parade of nominees, break down the systematic nomination process, and take a look at some of the G.O.P. members of the Senate who could stand in the way of confirmations. | | | |  | | --- | |  | | [WaPo in Limbo](https://email.puck.) | | PETER HAMBY & DYLAN BYERS | | Dylan Byers joins Peter to gab about the latest troubles at The Washington Post: another eight-figure loss, a subscriber exodus, and the confusion inside the newsroom over C.E.O. Will Lewis and interim-ish executive editor Matt Murray’s race to “reimagine” the paper before Bezos pulls the plug. | | | |  | | --- | | [Puck](https://email.puck.) | | |  |  |  |  | | --- | --- | --- | --- | | [Facebook](https://email.puck.news/e/c/eyJlbWFpbF9pZCI6ImRnVDJ4Z1lEQUt2UktxclJLZ0dUazEyYU5vcFZ0cjNyTUNDMF9Gaz0iLCJocmVmIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9mYWNlYm9vay5jb20vcHVja2RvdG5ld3M_) | [Twitter](https://email.puck.) | [Instagram](https://email.puck.) | [LinkedIn](https://email.puck.) | | | |  | | --- | | Need help?
